steps.title: Identify angle x° and its relative sides
steps.content:
The angle $x°$ is at the top-right corner. From this angle:
  • Opposite side = 40
  • Adjacent side = 39

steps.title: Use the tangent ratio to find c
steps.content:
Using opposite = 40 and adjacent = 39:
$$\tan x° = \frac{40}{39}$$

Since we know $\tan x° = \frac{c}{39}$, directly comparing gives $c = 40$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
